testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.title: CTO at Nexus Tech
testimonials.quote: The team felt like an extension of our internal staff. They communicated flawlessly and delivered our scalable MVP weeks ahead of schedule. I cannot recommend FlowStack highly enough.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.title: Founder, Aura Health
testimonials.quote: We were struggling with our platform's scalability. FlowStack stepped in, audited our AWS infrastructure, and refactored everything perfectly. Truly life-changing for our business.

testimonials.name: Elena Rodriguez
testimonials.title: VP Engineering, Strata
testimonials.quote: The perfect blend of technical rigor and beautiful design. The skills I gained from working alongside this team became the foundation of our entire internal engineering culture.

testimonials.name: David Kim
testimonials.title: Product Lead at Vertex
testimonials.quote: Leadership and technical excellence side-by-side. I recommend them to anyone serious about building a long-term, scalable product that won't break under pressure.

testimonials.name: Anita Desai
testimonials.title: CEO of Lumina AI
testimonials.quote: The depth of their React and Next.js knowledge is world-class. They stepped into our messy codebase and brought total clarity and performance optimizations within a week.

testimonials.name: Marcus Webb
testimonials.title: Director of Growth, FinFlow
testimonials.quote: They don't just write code; they understand business objectives. The e-commerce platform they delivered increased our conversion rate by 34% in the first month alone.

testimonials.name: Sophia Martinez
testimonials.title: Head of Product, Nova
testimonials.quote: Finding developers who actually care about UX design is rare. FlowStack bridged the gap perfectly, delivering a frontend that looks as good as it performs.

testimonials.name: James Wilson
testimonials.title: Founder, Elevate CRM
testimonials.quote: We threw an incredibly complex database architecture problem at them, and they solved it elegantly. Their technical architecture skills are simply unmatched.

portfolio.title: Professional Profile & Legal Platform
portfolio.description: A modern platform for a law lecturer and legal consultant featuring professional profile management, legal blogs and activities, book selling and free legal resources, consultation chat system, and a complete admin dashboard for managing content, publications, and client interactions.

portfolio.title: School Management Platform
portfolio.description: Comprehensive school management system and institutional website for managing students, classes, lecturers, enrollment, finance, news, academic programs, and communication through a modern centralized platform.

portfolio.title: CargoTrack Dashboard
portfolio.description: Real-time global fleet tracking and analytics dashboard for enterprise supply chain management.

portfolio.title: Nova Blockchain Explorer
portfolio.description: High-performance block explorer and analytics engine processing millions of transactions per second.

faqs.question: How do you handle communication?
faqs.answer: We set up a dedicated Slack channel for real-time chat and provide weekly video syncs to review progress.

faqs.question: What is your time zone?
faqs.answer: We are primarily based in EST and PST, but we accommodate client meetings across most global time zones.

faqs.question: How are revisions handled?
faqs.answer: We include up to 2 rounds of major revisions during the Strategy phase and minor tweaks throughout Execution to ensure you love the final product.

process.title: Discovery
process.desc: We deep-dive into your business goals, target audience, and technical requirements.

process.title: Strategy
process.desc: We map out user flows, architect the database, and create high-fidelity prototypes.

process.title: Execution
process.desc: Our engineers build the platform using modern, scalable technologies.

process.title: Launch
process.desc: We handle deployment, performance optimization, and provide ongoing support.

services.title: The MVP
services.description: Perfect for startups needing to validate an idea quickly. A functional, polished V1 delivered in 4-6 weeks.

services.title: The Core
services.description: For growing companies needing a scalable, production-ready platform with custom features.

services.title: The Dedicated
services.description: Ongoing partnership. We act as your external engineering and design department on retainer.
